basic_details.job_title: DPCC Trainee Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 150 Posts
basic_details.short_information: DPCC Trainee Recruitment 2026: Get the latest Delhi Pollution Control Committee (DPCC) recruitment notification 2026 for 150 Trainee (Technical & Scientific) vacancies on Contractual/Monthly Stipend Basis under the Department of Environment, Govt. of NCT of Delhi. The last date to apply online is 21 days from the date of advertisement uploaded on the DPCC website. Find DPCC vacancies on the official website dpcc.delhi.gov.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of "Upcoming DPCC Trainee Recruitment 2026" notifications for freshers and experienced candidates. Also know the direct official link for

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 21 days from the date of advertisement (inclusive of date of publication) uploaded on DPCC website

qualification.details: Candidates must have passed out the requisite qualifying examination in the year 2023 or later before selection. Qualification must be on a Full Time Regular basis from a Recognized University/Institution completed in year 2023 or later with First Division. Candidates having a qualifying GATE/NET score of 2023, 2024, 2025, or 2026 will be preferred. Candidates who have served as Trainees earlier with DPCC are not eligible to be re-engaged. | Educational Qualification | Preference: Candidates having qualifying score of GATE/NET 2023, 2024, 2025, or 2026 will be preferred. In case of equal GATE/NET Score/Percentile of multiple candidates, the candidate with higher percentage in qualifying examination shall determine their merit position.

salary_details.pay_scale: 1st Year: Rs. 25,000/- per month; 2nd Year: Rs. 26,500/- per month; 3rd Year: Rs. 28,000/- per month

selection_process: Primary Merit (i) Merit based on qualifying GATE/NET scores from 2023 examination or later
Secondary Merit (ii) If sufficient candidates are not available under Merit (i): merit based on marks obtained in the qualifying examination passed in year 2023 or later
Trainees will be selected on the basis of merit prepared as follows. The final Merit List shall be prepared by first placing GATE/NET qualified candidates in order of merit
followed by candidates in the merit list based on marks obtained in the qualifying exam.

A panel of wait-listed candidates shall be prepared for considering their engagement depending upon vacancies arising in the respective categories. The panel shall be valid for one period of one year from the date of final result on the DPCC website by way of office order.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through the website https://dpcc.delhi.gov.in as per the link provided therein. Application in physical form or any other form will not be accepted/entertained and will be summarily rejected.

No correspondence will be entertained in this regard. Candidates must attach copies of GATE/NET marks obtained and the qualifying examination marksheets (passed in year 2023 or later) with the application.
Valid Caste Certificate must be attached along with the application for availing reservation under the respective reserved categories.
Last Date Note: The last date of submission of the online application will be 21 days from the date of advertisement (inclusive of the date of publication) uploaded on the DPCC website.
important_instructions: Candidates must only apply online through the DPCC website; physical or any other mode of application will be summarily rejected. The applicant should have passed out the requisite qualifying examination in the year 2023 or later before selection. Qualification must be with First Division on Full Time Regular basis from a Recognized University/Institution completed in year 2023 or later. GATE/NET marks obtained and the qualifying examination passed in year 2023 or later — copies of Mark Sheet are to be attached. Reservation for SC, ST, OBC-NCL (Delhi), EWS, and PwBD will be applicable as per the Rule/Guidelines of GNCTD/DoPT issued from time to time; valid Caste Certificate must be attached. The numbers of Trainees (Technical and Scientific) to be engaged and their ratio are tentative and may be increased/decreased as per requirements. DPCC reserves the right to cancel the advertisement and not to proceed at any stage without assigning any reason. Trainees shall not claim any regular/permanent employment on the basis of their said engagement. Candidates who have served as Trainees earlier with DPCC are not eligible to be re-engaged. No application in any other mode shall be entertained and will be summarily rejected.

faq.question: Q1. What is DPCC Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Delhi Pollution Control Committee (DPCC), Department of Environment, Govt. of NCT of Delhi, has released notification F. No. DPCC/3(9)(412)/Admn-2026/ for engagement of Technical and Scientific Trainees on a contractual basis with a monthly stipend.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in DPCC Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 150 Trainee vacancies in total, including both Technical and Scientific Trainees, with category-wise reservation as per GNCTD/DoPT rules.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for DPCC Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 21 days from the date of advertisement (inclusive of the date of publication) uploaded on the DPCC website; for this recruitment, the advertisement date is 17-05-2026 as per DPCC.

faq.question: Q4. What is the ratio of Technical to Scientific Trainee vacancies in DPCC?
faq.answer: The tentative ratio of Technical Trainees (B.E./B.Tech) to Scientific Trainees (M.Sc.) is 10:01, and the number of posts may be increased or decreased as per requirement.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications for DPCC Technical Trainee?
faq.answer: Technical Trainees must have a full-time regular B.E./B.Tech degree with First Division in 2023 or later in disciplines such as Civil, Environmental, Chemical, Electrical, Mechanical, ECE, Biomedical, Water Resources, Remote Sensing, GIS, Hydrology, or equivalent.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications for DPCC Scientific Trainee?
faq.answer: Scientific Trainees must have a full-time regular M.Sc. degree with First Division in 2023 or later in Biochemistry, Microbiology, Life Science, Chemistry, Environmental Chemistry, Analytical Chemistry, Toxicology, or equivalent disciplines.

faq.question: Q7. Is GATE/NET compulsory for DPCC Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: GATE/NET is not compulsory but candidates having valid GATE/NET scores of 2023, 2024, 2025, or 2026 will be given preference, and the primary merit list is prepared based on these scores.

faq.question: Q8. What is the stipend for DPCC Trainee posts?
faq.answer: Selected Trainees will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 25,000/- in the 1st year, Rs. 26,500/- in the 2nd year, and Rs. 28,000/- in the 3rd year of engagement.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for DPCC Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: DPCC will prepare the merit list first based on GATE/NET scores (2023 or later), and if sufficient candidates are not available, merit will be based on marks obtained in the qualifying examination passed in 2023 or later; a waitlist panel valid for one year will also be prepared.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply online for DPCC Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online only through the official DPCC website https://dpcc.delhi.gov.in using the Trainee application link; physical or any other mode of application will not be accepted and will be summarily rejected.
